g.title: SystolicArrayWSControl
g.text: Main FSM, command entry, concurrent output capture, and A-prefetch mini-FSM

g.title: legend
g.text: Solid arrows: main FSM state transitions
Dashed arrows: concurrent side effects or auxiliary FSM interactions
Amber nodes: RoCC command decode cases from
Orange notes: global behavior that updates registers without changing

g.title: datapath_note
g.text: back to 0 before indexing the active A buffer

g.title: capture_note
g.text: this is independent of the explicit
logic, so the mesh can retire rows while the FSM stays in a wait state

g.title: prefetch_gate
g.text: ; prefetch is only launched during compute/drain states, so both paths can safely share source ID 0

g.title: pf_req_fill_a
g.text: request one TL Get beat for the prefetched A chunk buffer
Active only while main state is:

g.title: command_dispatch
g.text: selects config, run, status, preload, counter read, counter clear, or run_preloaded

g.title: cmd_run_preloaded
g.text: same control/prefetch registers as RUN, clear

g.title: cmd_status
g.text: bit 0 reports "currently in response state"; bit 1 reports "busy or returning"

g.title: resp
g.text: return the previously prepared response to the RoCC interface

g.title: req_fill_b_cache
g.text: issue the first B-cache TL Get for a preload or a run-time miss

g.title: prep_chunk
g.text: choose the next chunk source and decide whether execution is finished
in BF16-output mode or directly to
, then fetch A for the active buffer

g.title: idle
g.text: quiescent state; accept exactly one RoCC command

g.title: wait_fill_b_cache
g.text: keep issuing additional B beats while consuming returning data beats
; more requests can overlap prior responses

g.title: wait_fill_b_cache->wait_fill_b_cache
g.text: may issue more a beats and/or consume d beats

g.title: wait_fill_b_cache->prep_chunk
g.text: d.fire and nextIdx >= bRequestedK and bFillForRun

g.title: req_fill_a
g.text: issue a TL Get beat for the active A chunk buffer
++, then go wait for the returning beat

g.title: load_weights
g.text: pulse the mesh weight-load input for the current chunk

g.title: quantize_out
g.text: register the combinational BF16-packed output words before TileLink writeback

g.title: req_put
g.text: issue a TL Put beat that writes output words back to memory

g.title: wait_fill_a
g.text: consume one A beat into the active ping-pong buffer
store each valid returned lane into
when the chunk is full, otherwise loop back to

g.title: feed_rows
g.text: stream one row index per cycle from the active A chunk into the core

g.title: feed_rows->capture_note
g.text: inValid pulses create future outValid pulses

g.title: wait_chunk_out
g.text: drain mesh outputs for the current chunk and wait for the next chunk to be ready
only leave when output drain is done and either
chunk drain may finish before the parallel A-prefetch path finishes loading the next chunk

g.title: wait_put
g.text: wait for the TileLink write acknowledgement for the current output beat
when all output words are done, otherwise

g.title: pf_idle
g.text: no background A prefetch is in flight
reached after reset-like command setup or after a prefetched chunk becomes valid

g.title: pf_req_fill_a->pf_req_fill_a
g.text: wait for shared tlOut.a to fire

g.title: pf_wait_fill_a
g.text: accept the returning prefetched A beat into
Active only while main state is:
write valid lanes into the prefetched buffer, then advance

g.title: pf_wait_fill_a->pf_wait_fill_a
g.text: wait for shared tlOut.d to fire
